content: Gap convergence followed a clean exponential decay: 22→6→2→0 across 4 cycles, well within the maxGapCycles=10 budget. The 73% reduction per cycle (22→6=73%, 6→2=67%, 2→0=100%) demonstrates that the fix-verify-hunt loop is efficient. Only 4 of 10 allowed cycles were needed, suggesting the maxGapCycles=10 setting is generous for 67-agent systems.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
